name: WLF_ACCESS_PERMISSIONS_F
description: Table to store user access permissions on Learning Items

columns.Name: ACCESS_PERMISSION_ID
columns.Comments: System generated unique identifier.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_START_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the beginning of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_END_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the end of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: ACCESS_PERMISSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: UserKey to uniquely identify Access Permission.

columns.Name: SS_VIEW_MODE
columns.Comments: Self-service view mode that is visible to the user

columns.Name: ASSIGN_FOR_SELF
columns.Comments: Self join assignment initial status

columns.Name: ASSIGN_AS_MANAGER
columns.Comments: Manager join assignment initial status

columns.Name: ADMIN_ACCESS_MODE
columns.Comments: Access mode in the admin work area catalog

columns.Name: MANAGE_LEARNER
columns.Comments: Admin access to manage learners

columns.Name: MANAGE_ADMIN
columns.Comments: Admin access to manage admins

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: SS_ACTIVATE_ON_APPROVE
columns.Comments: When the SS request is approved the learning assignment is immediatly active

columns.Name: MNGR_ACTIVATE_ON_APPROVE
columns.Comments: When the manager request is approved the learning assignment is immediatly active

columns.Name: SS_SHOW_REQ_FORM
columns.Comments: Determines whether the self-service Request form should be displayed to the user.

columns.Name: MGR_SHOW_REQ_FORM
columns.Comments: Determines wheather the manager Request form should be displayed to the user

columns.Name: PREREQ_SELF_EVAL_TYPE
columns.Comments: Prereq eval type , either Deferred or Not Deferred

columns.Name: PREREQ_SELF_EVAL_DAYS
columns.Comments: Number of days after assigned on date prereq has to be evaluated

columns.Name: PREREQ_MGR_EVAL_TYPE
columns.Comments: Prereq eval type , either Deferred or Not Defered

columns.Name: PREREQ_MGR_EVAL_DAYS
columns.Comments: Number of days after assigned on date prereq has to be evaluated

columns.Name: ADMIN_VIEW_ACCESS_MODE
columns.Comments: This column stores various options for admin's view access mode for admin managed learning items

columns.Name: ADMIN_ADMINISTRATION_MODE
columns.Comments: This column stores various options for admin's administration access mode for admin managed learning items

columns.Name: INSTRUCTOR_ACCESS_MODE
columns.Comments: This column stores various options for Instructor's administration access mode for admin managed learning items

columns.Name: FOLLOW_COMMUNITY
columns.Comments: Column to hold Y or N to check if the community is followed

columns.Name: FOLLOW_SPEC
columns.Comments: Column to hold the values of Y or N to determine if the Specializaiton is followed

columns.Name: LRNR_ENROLL_QSTNR
columns.Comments: Column to enable enrollment questionnaire for learner

columns.Name: LRNR_QUESTIONNAIRE_ID
columns.Comments: Column to hold learner enrollment questionnaire id

columns.Name: MGR_ENROLL_QSTNR
columns.Comments: Column to enable enrollment questionnaire for manager

columns.Name: MGR_QUESTIONNAIRE_ID
columns.Comments: Column to hold manager enrollment questionnaire id

columns.Name: MGR_ENROLL_COMPLETE
columns.Comments: Column to indicate if a learner manager can mark enrollment records complete

columns.Name: MGR_APPR_ENROLL_COMPLETE
columns.Comments: Column to indicate if manager needs approvals to make an enrollment complete

columns.Name: ENROLLMENT_CONDITION
columns.Comments: Indicates if a learner can enroll in this learning item

columns.Name: ENROLLMENT_START_DATE
columns.Comments: Column to indicate the enrollment start date

columns.Name: ENROLLMENT_END_DATE
columns.Comments: Column to indicate the enrollment end date

columns.Name: ENROLLMENT_VISIBILITY_MSS
columns.Comments: Column to indicate the enrollment visibility

columns.Name: WITHDRAW_RULE_ESS
columns.Comments: Column to indicate the withdrawal rule for learners

columns.Name: WITHDRAW_RULE_MSS
columns.Comments: Column to indicate the withdrawal rule for managers

columns.Name: WITHDRAW_PERIOD
columns.Comments: Column to indicate the period when learner can withdraw

columns.Name: WITHDRAW_PERIOD_UNITS
columns.Comments: Number of units for the unit of measure of withdraw period

columns.Name: WITHDRAW_PERIOD_UOM
columns.Comments: Unit of Measure for withdraw period

columns.Name: WITHDRAW_PERIOD_BEFORE
columns.Comments: Column to indicate till when withdraw can happen
